title: Vanilla Clans
description: Vanilla Clans is a plugin for basic clan-related commands.
body:
# ![The image says "Vanilla Clans" in purple in Minecraft font.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfa060a179e25ad930f5f89c1c17172d2c6d7cc4.png)
Hi, this plugin I created is for easily creating a clan system that will fit into vanilla gameplay or any vanilla+ server setups. For now, it only contains basic commands, but in the future, there will be more for a more detailed clan system! I also really hope to receive feedback so I can improve my plugin (My Telegram @VcePusto).
Usage:
> **/clan create <name> <color>** - command to create a clan. If you don't specify a color, it will be white by default.
> **/clan info** - displays information about the clan you're in.
> **/clan delete** - deletes a clan if you own it.
> **/clan kick <player>** - kicks a player from a clan if you own it.
> **/clan invite <player>** - invites someone to join a clan.
> **/clan accept - accepts** an invitation.
> **/clan refuse - declines** an invitation.
> **/clan leave** - to leave the clan.
